programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Sailing Into a Home on Maui
programme.desc: A sailor brings his girlfriend on his house hunt in Maui, Hawaii; for him, rental potential and proximity to the beach are key to his low-stress lifestyle but she's trying to convince him to buy farther up the mountain due to her fear of tsunamis.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Country Living in Wisconsin
programme.desc: An Air Force couple in Wisconsin is searching for a home where their kids can grow up; she wants be close to her parents, but he's hoping for a large lot out in the country.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Wish List Mirage in Arizona
programme.desc: A broker who lives outside Detroit is looking for a second home in Arizona to escape the Michigan winters.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Compromise in Waukesha
programme.desc: Newlyweds search for their first home in Waukesha, Wis.; the hunt puts their new marriage to its first big test, as he wants vintage charm and she wants a big, open-concept home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Chicago's Positive Energy
programme.desc: A couple searches for a first home together in the Windy City; one of them wants a rehabbed downtown loft that's both move-in-ready and modern, but the other wants a bungalow in the suburbs that may need a little work and has positive energy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Busting at the Seams
programme.desc: A couple with five daughters between them is looking for a large family home in Phoenix; she wants Mediterranean, but he's got his eye on a one-story contemporary; the other members of the family agree that they all want a pool.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Fishing for a Full-Time Home on Lake Ontario
programme.desc: A New York couple loves living in Rochester but wants to move their family closer to the water; after years of saving, they are finally ready to find a full-time home on Lake Ontario.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Living Large on Lake Lakengren, Ohio
programme.desc: A St. Petersburg, Fla., couple wants to spend more time with family up north, but they don't want to give up waterfront living; they've decided to look for a vacation home on Ohio's Lake Lakengren that has the potential for full-time living.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Making the Move to Morse Lake, Indiana
programme.desc: A Westfield, Ind., couple with five children relocate so they can enjoy lake living full-time; having grown up with visits to a lake cottage, he wants the kids to have the same experience, so the couple look for a place on nearby Morse Lake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: The Shores of Lake Champlain
programme.desc: A family of five from South Colonie, NY, searches for a family retreat along the shores of Lake Champlain; over the past decade, they've enjoyed spending time along the shores there and feel it's time for the family to start a new adventure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: A New Life on Lake Lanier in Georgia
programme.desc: A couple living in Atlanta, Georgia, loves visiting Lake Lanier, and while he grew up around the water, she wasn't sold on lake living until they vacationed there together; they are now ready to buy their dream home and move to the lake full-time.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: From a Camper to a House
programme.desc: A Wisconsin family of four loves camping along Solberg Lake, but they're tired of sharing campground space; they are on the hunt for their own vacation house that they can enjoy together.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Return to Lake Seminole, GA
programme.desc: A couple with a hectic lifestyle look to slow down by moving their growing family lakeside; she grew up enjoying the water on Lake Seminole in Georgia and thinks it's the perfect place to unwind and live year-round.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Permanent Pad on Norris Lake, Tennessee
programme.desc: A Chicago couple with a teenage daughter look for more room to spread out and enjoy time together; they feel like now is the time to find a budget-friendly permanent home on Norris Lake, Tenn., with million-dollar views.

programme.sub-title: A Lake House Between Friends
